description:
Fresh Air Park - Cottonwood Shores: Where Pickleball Gets Lit!

Calling all Pickleheads! Get ready to serve up some fun under the stars at Fresh Air Park's brand new, state-of-the-art pickleball courts.
Features:

*4 lighted courts: Play day or night, no matter the weather!
*Reservations: Grab your court time online and avoid the wait.
*Organized Open Play: Meet new players, make friends, and level up your game.
*Lessons & Clinics Coming Soon: Whether you're a beginner or a pro, get ready to take your skills to the next level.

The Perfect Pickleball Destination:
Located in the heart of Cottonwood Shores, Fresh Air Park isn't just about pickleball. Enjoy delicious food truck fare, a refreshing drink at the wine bar, and let the kids loose in the playground. It's the ultimate family-friendly destination for pickleball enthusiasts!
Don't miss out on the action. Book your court today and experience pickleball like never before!
